title: Trends in the Management of Oligodendrogliomas: A Multinational and Multidisciplinary Survey Study.
abstract: Oligodendrogliomas present challenges in management despite their favorable prognosis. Optimal therapeutic strategies are not well-established. We aimed to characterize current practice patterns and identify areas of discordance in oligodendroglioma management.
trial_name: Adjuvant procarbazine, lomustine, and vincristine chemotherapy in newly diagnosed anaplastic oligodendroglioma
